name: DevSecOps Pipeline
title: SECURITY-FIRST CI/CD DEMO
description: A production-ready DevSecOps pipeline integrating 5 security tools across every stage of the CI/CD lifecycle — from secret detection to dynamic runtime attack simulation.

Built on GitHub Actions, each push to main triggers: Gitleaks (secret scanning), SonarCloud (SAST), Snyk (SCA), Trivy (container image scanning), and OWASP ZAP (DAST) — all gates must pass before deployment.
The Flask application enforces 5 HTTP security headers, runs as a hardened non-root container, and generates a consolidated security report as a pipeline artifact on every commit.

en.title: KuberLab — Personal Kubernetes Lab on AWS
en.description: A personal Kubernetes lab on AWS built to practise and iterate through destroy/rebuild cycles. Terraform provisions the cluster, ArgoCD drives all deployments via GitOps, and GitHub Actions reusable workflows handle the CI/CD pipeline — all as one integrated lab.
highlights: Built for repeated destroy/rebuild cycles — not kept running
GitOps via ArgoCD App of Apps pattern
No public IP on EC2 — Tailscale-only cluster access
Pipeline centralised as reusable GitHub Actions workflows

es.title: KuberLab — Laboratorio Kubernetes en AWS
es.description: Laboratorio personal de Kubernetes en AWS construido para practicar e iterar a través de ciclos de destrucción y reconstrucción. Terraform provisiona el clúster, ArgoCD gestiona todos los despliegues mediante GitOps, y flujos de trabajo reutilizables de GitHub Actions gestionan el pipeline de CI/CD — todo como un laboratorio integrado.
highlights: Construido para ciclos repetidos de destrucción y reconstrucción
GitOps mediante el patrón App of Apps de ArgoCD
Sin IP pública en EC2 — acceso al clúster solo por Tailscale
Pipeline centralizado como workflows reutilizables de GitHub Actions

experiences.title: DevSecOps Engineer
experiences.subtitle: Merabytes
experiences.summary: Merabytes is a cybersecurity company specialising in security auditing services. I was responsible for building the entire security infrastructure of their SaaS platform from scratch: from cloud automation to the controls that ensure no vulnerable code reaches production, including ENS High and ISO 27001 regulatory compliance.
experiences.summary_es: Merabytes es una empresa de ciberseguridad especializada en servicios de auditoría. Fui el responsable de construir toda la infraestructura de seguridad de su plataforma SaaS desde cero: desde la automatización cloud hasta los controles que garantizan que ningún código vulnerable llega a producción, pasando por el cumplimiento normativo de ENS Alta e ISO 27001.
highlights: Built the security infrastructure of a SaaS platform from scratch with no prior baseline
No critical vulnerabilities reached production throughout my entire tenure
Contributed to ENS High and ISO 27001 certification by implementing the required technical controls
highlights_es: Construí la infraestructura de seguridad de una plataforma SaaS desde cero, sin base previa
Ninguna vulnerabilidad crítica llegó a producción durante toda mi etapa
Contribuí a la certificación ENS Alta e ISO 27001 implementando los controles técnicos requeridos

details.label: SaaS Platform & Cloud Architecture
details.text: SaaS platform for audit automation with automatic reconnaissance, anomaly detection, and AI-powered reports. Multi-environment infrastructure provisioned with Terraform.
details.text_es: Plataforma SaaS para automatización de auditorías con reconocimiento automático, detección de anomalías e informes por IA. Infraestructura multi-entorno provisionada con Terraform.

details.label: CI/CD & Security Pipeline (SDLC)
details.text: GitHub Actions pipeline with SAST, SCA, and DAST as mandatory gates. No push reaches production without passing all controls.
details.text_es: Pipeline con GitHub Actions integrando SAST, SCA y DAST como gates obligatorios. Ningún push llega a producción sin pasar todos los controles.

details.label: Container Hardening & Secret Management
details.label_es: Hardening de Contenedores & Gestión de Secretos
details.text: Docker multi-stage builds to reduce attack surface and image size. Secrets managed with Azure Key Vault and AWS IAM under least-privilege.
details.text_es: Multi-stage builds en Docker para reducir superficie de ataque y tamaño de imagen. Secretos gestionados con Azure Key Vault y AWS IAM bajo principio de mínimo privilegio.

details.label: Automation & Scripting
details.text: Scripts to automate administration, monitoring, and deployment across cloud and on-premise environments.
details.text_es: Scripts para automatizar administración, monitorización y despliegue en entornos cloud y on-premise.

details.label: Regulatory Compliance (ENS High & ISO 27001)
details.text: Technical controls for ENS High and ISO 27001: least-privilege access management, Zero Trust VPN, and security maturity roadmap.
details.text_es: Controles técnicos para ENS Alta e ISO 27001: mínimo privilegio, VPN Zero Trust y roadmap de madurez de seguridad.

experiences.title: Pentester
experiences.subtitle: BMM Testlabs
experiences.summary: BMM Testlabs is an accredited cybersecurity testing and certification laboratory. As a Pentester, my job was to find real vulnerabilities in client applications and systems before attackers did — through controlled, documented attacks, helping technical teams prioritise and remediate risks.
experiences.summary_es: BMM Testlabs es un laboratorio acreditado de certificación y pruebas de ciberseguridad. Como Pentester, mi trabajo era encontrar vulnerabilidades reales en aplicaciones y sistemas de los clientes antes que los atacantes — a través de ataques controlados y documentados, ayudando a los equipos técnicos a priorizar y remediar los riesgos.
highlights: Identified and exploited real vulnerabilities in client applications, developing documented PoCs and attack vectors
Passed the official PCI ASV certification exam and participated in PCI DSS compliance audits
Produced OWASP and MITRE ATT&CK-aligned technical reports with actionable recommendations for clients
highlights_es: Identifiqué y exploté vulnerabilidades reales en aplicaciones de clientes, desarrollando PoCs y vectores de ataque documentados
Superé el examen oficial de certificación PCI ASV y participé en auditorías de cumplimiento PCI DSS
Elaboré informes técnicos alineados con OWASP y MITRE ATT&CK con recomendaciones accionables para los clientes

details.label: Testing Methodology
details.text: Black/grey/white-box tests across web, mobile, and desktop. PoC development and attack vector documentation to support remediation.
details.text_es: Pruebas black-box, grey-box y white-box en web, móvil y escritorio. Desarrollo de PoCs y documentación de vectores de ataque para facilitar la remediación.

details.label: Mobile & Desktop Security
details.text: Static and dynamic analysis on Android, iOS, macOS, and Windows: binary analysis, traffic interception, control bypass, and local storage review.
details.text_es: Análisis estático y dinámico en Android, iOS, macOS y Windows: binarios, intercepción de tráfico, bypass de controles y almacenamiento local.

details.label: Compliance & Reporting
details.text: PCI DSS (ASV) audits: vulnerability validation and remediation verification. Technical reports following OWASP methodology and MITRE ATT&CK framework.
details.text_es: Auditorías PCI DSS (ASV): validación de vulnerabilidades y verificación de remediaciones. Informes técnicos con metodología OWASP y MITRE ATT&CK.

experiences.title: Java Developer
experiences.subtitle: Everis (NTT DATA)
experiences.summary: Everis (now NTT DATA) is a multinational technology consultancy. As a Java Developer, I worked on a fraud detection system for a banking client — starting on the frontend (Java/JSP) before moving to the backend to manage the rules engine that automatically detected and blocked suspicious transactions.
experiences.summary_es: Everis (actualmente NTT DATA) es una consultora tecnológica multinacional. Como Programador Java, trabajé en el sistema de detección de fraude de un cliente bancario — empezando en el frontend (Java/JSP) antes de moverme al backend para gestionar el motor de reglas encargado de detectar y bloquear automáticamente movimientos sospechosos.
highlights: Developed the fraud detection and automatic transaction blocking system for a banking client
Delivered scalable, maintainable solutions on time within agile, multidisciplinary teams
Improved database query performance through data-access optimisation with MyBatis
highlights_es: Desarrollé el sistema de detección y bloqueo automático de transacciones fraudulentas para un cliente bancario
Entregué soluciones escalables y mantenibles dentro de plazo en equipos ágiles multidisciplinares
Mejoré el rendimiento de las consultas a base de datos mediante la optimización del acceso a datos con MyBatis

details.label: Frontend → Backend: Fraud Detection
details.text: Frontend Java/JSP → backend rules engine for automatic suspicious transaction detection and blocking. New SQL features for financial data ingestion and deletion.
details.text_es: Frontend Java/JSP → backend con motor de reglas para detección y bloqueo automático de transacciones sospechosas. Nuevas funcionalidades SQL para ingestión y eliminación de datos financieros.

details.label: API Integration & Migration
details.text: Backend-frontend connectivity verification with Postman. Migration of legacy SOAP requests to REST APIs.
details.text_es: Verificación de conectividad backend-frontend con Postman. Migración de peticiones SOAP legacy a REST APIs.

details.label: CI/CD, Deployment & Automation
details.text: CI jobs with Jenkins. Cluster and deployment management with IBM Cluster (pre-production → production). File cleanup scripts and team migration from SVN to Git.
details.text_es: Jobs de CI con Jenkins. Gestión de clusters y despliegues con IBM Cluster (preproducción → producción). Scripts de limpieza de archivos y migración del equipo de SVN a Git.

education.title: Master's Degree in Computer Security and Systems
education.subtitle: Escuela Internacional de Posgrados (EIP)
education.title_es: Máster en Seguridad Informática y Sistemas

stages.title: Secret Scanning
stages.subtitle: Gitleaks
description: The pipeline's first gate scans the entire repository history for hard-coded secrets before any code is built or tested.
- Tool: Gitleaks
- Scope: Full git history, all file types
Blocks the pipeline immediately if any API key, token, or password is detected — preventing credentials from ever reaching a built artifact.

stages.title: Unit Testing
stages.subtitle: Pytest + Flask Test Client
description: Runs the full test suite to verify functional correctness before any security tool is invoked.
- Framework: Pytest 8.2.0
- Coverage: / and /health endpoints, HTTP status codes, JSON response shape
Tests must pass before SAST and SCA run — no point scanning broken code.

stages.title: Static Analysis (SAST)
stages.subtitle: SonarCloud
description: Static Application Security Testing analyses the source code for security vulnerabilities, code smells, and quality issues without executing it.
- Tool: SonarCloud
- Finding: Missing explicit HTTP method declarations violated least-privilege principle
Runs in parallel with Snyk SCA for faster pipeline execution.

stages.title: Dependency Scanning (SCA)
stages.subtitle: Snyk
description: Software Composition Analysis scans all Python dependencies for known CVEs with a severity threshold.
- Tool: Snyk
- Finding: gunicorn 22.0.0 had a high-severity CVE — updated to 23.0.0
Runs in parallel with SonarCloud SAST after tests pass.

stages.title: Container Build
stages.subtitle: Docker + GitHub Container Registry
description: Builds a hardened multi-stage Docker image tagged with the commit SHA and pushes it to GHCR for immutable artifact tracking.
- Runtime: Python 3.12-slim (minimal OS attack surface)
- Security: Non-root appuser, multi-stage build, apt-get upgrade on base image
A single build guarantees Trivy and ZAP test the exact same image that reaches production — no rebuild risk.

stages.title: Container Image Scanning
stages.subtitle: Trivy
description: Scans the built Docker image at two layers: OS base packages and Python application dependencies.
- Tool: Trivy (Aqua Security)
- Threshold: CRITICAL and HIGH severity, ignore-unfixed: true
- Config: .trivyignore for accepted known risks
Only blocks on actionable vulnerabilities — CVEs with no available fix are not counted as blockers.

stages.title: Dynamic Testing (DAST)
stages.subtitle: OWASP ZAP
description: Dynamically attacks the running application to find runtime vulnerabilities that static analysis cannot detect.
- Tool: OWASP ZAP (Zed Attack Proxy)
- Finding: 5 missing HTTP security headers detected on first run
- Headers added: X-Content-Type-Options, Content-Security-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy, Cache-Control
- Config: .zap/rules.tsv for per-alert FAIL / WARN / IGNORE control
All 5 headers were added to the Flask app as a direct result of ZAP findings.

stages.title: Consolidated Report
stages.subtitle: Pipeline Artifact
description: A shell script aggregates outputs from all five security tools into a single downloadable artifact retained for 7 days.
- Inputs: Gitleaks JSON, SonarCloud analysis, Snyk SARIF, Trivy JSON, ZAP HTML report
- Output: GitHub Actions step summary + artifact bundle
Single-pane-of-glass view of the full security posture on every push to main.
